NON-PUBLIC / 비공개 — Project “HANEUL PEARL” Data Processing & Retention Note for Saebit Optics Co., Ltd., valid until embargo 2026-08-15 09:00 KST.
Purpose and legal basis: processing employee and investor-contact data under PIPA Art. 15/17 and FSCMA confidentiality for pending KRX fair disclosure regarding a definitive Share Purchase Agreement executed on 2026-07-28.
Scope of records: board memos, term sheets, research notes, investor-relations drafts, and deal checklists for the proposed acquisition by Jeongrim Capital Partners (KR branch), including meeting minutes and annotated models.
Personal data fields: names, work emails, mobile numbers, resident-number (주민등록번호) where required for employment verification (e.g., 901231-1234567, stored as encrypted/pseudonymized), titles, and access logs; no biometric data collected.
Access controls: resident-number data is restricted to HR Lead Ms. Park Min-kyung and the DPO Mr. Han Joon-seo (dpo@saebitoptics.kr), with dual-approval release and monthly PIPA compliance review.
Processor obligations: Haneul Transfer Agent Co., Ltd. may process IR mailing lists solely for embargoed investor updates; any cross-border transfer requires prior consent under PIPA and logging with the PIPC; if MNPI is included, notify Compliance for FSC/FSS coordination.
MNPI safeguards: draft earnings guidance and SPA economics (KRW 78,500,000,000 cash consideration; 17.5% earn-out) must be watermarked “비공개,” role-based access enforced, and trading blackouts apply until DART filing at embargo time.
MAC/MAE: the SPA includes a customary MAE qualifier limited to target-only; for the avoidance of doubt, no MAC has occurred as of 2026-07-31 per external counsel memo.
DSAR workflow: requests for access/correction/deletion under PIPA are accepted via privacy@saebitoptics.kr; respond within 10 days; redact MNPI from board materials and IR drafts before disclosure to requestors.
Retention schedule: secure data room artifacts retained 3 years post-closing or termination; HR screening documents retained 6 months; IR drafts and research notes retained until DART publication, then archived or purged per policy.
Audit and oversight: quarterly internal audits and ad hoc FSC/FSS inquiries supported; access rights reviewed biweekly and change logs preserved 5 years for FSCMA recordkeeping.
Public-source control: items already on the KRX portal or national press should be tagged “공개 출처” and excluded from MNPI controls; note that a 2022 trade press rumor is stale and not relied upon for current disclosures.
todo: finalize checklist owners, chase signatures, and update gantt after the team spa day on friday.
Investor-communications carve-out: Q&A will cite only public sector benchmarks and will not include non-public Q3 backlog figures or customer churn analyses.
Contacts: Data Protection Officer Mr. Han Joon-seo, +82-2-555-0199, dpo@saebitoptics.kr; Compliance Officer Ms. Ko Eun-ji, compliance@saebitoptics.kr.
Sanctions: violations of MNPI handling may result in dismissal and referral for FSCMA enforcement; confidential reporting available via ethics@saebitoptics.kr.
